title: 10 health benefits of Citrus aurantium (bitter orange)
intro: Citrus aurantium has health benefits such as reducing anxiety and depression, improving digestion, and boosting metabolism. Its medicinal properties include flavonoids, alkaloids, and volatile oils that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and stimulant effects. These properties can help individuals manage stress and improve sleep quality, leading to a better overall well-being. For instance, the antidepressant properties of bitter orange extract may alleviate symptoms of mild depression, while its digestive benefits can relieve constipation and bloating, enhancing daily life for those suffering from these conditions.
